section_miscategorizations.text: Blood pressure readings were sometimes in the one forties.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a historical/home blood pressure description, not a specific clinician-measured vital from this encounter, so it fits better as patient-reported subjective information.
Denials of symptoms are part of the review of systems and belong in the subjective section, not in objective findings.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of kidney stones.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history is patient history/subjective context, not an assessment or diagnostic impression for this visit.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of diabetes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Past medical history (diabetes) is part of the subjective history rather than the assessment section in this template definition.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is in so much pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a description of the patient's symptom experience and severity, which is subjective rather than a synthesized clinical assessment.
